overview.description: The Pacer Swan SOS Moderate (July) ETF (PSMJ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund aims for specific buffered losses and capped gains on the SPDR S&P 500 ETF over a specific holdings period. The actively managed fund holds options and collateral. PSMJ was launched on Jun 30, 2021 and is issued by Pacer.
